title: Iran rebuffs Trump's plan for new round of peace talks, state media reports
summary_full: Iran's top negotiator says his government has "no trust" in its enemies, after Trump says the U.S. won't be blackmailed.
summary_public: Iran's top negotiator says his government has "no trust" in its enemies, after Trump says the U.S. won't be blackmailed.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran rebuffs Trump's plan for new round of peace talks
